goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'sunday' and should go to 'norwich'.
The train should 'arrive by 11:00' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of museum
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on sunday and should go to norwich
The train should arrive by 11:00 and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get departure time
